evals.prompt: I need a new hero block for my site redesign. It should have a full-width background image with a heading, description text, and a CTA button overlaid. On mobile the text should stack below the image. See issue #15.
evals.expected_output: Full TDD loop: fixtures created in drafts/fixtures/hero/, spec written in specs/hero/, Playwright scripts written to test/tmp/ and executed, block code in blocks/hero/. Tracer bullet assertion first, then layered assertions. All verified in browser.

evals.prompt: The posts block needs to be redesigned as a card grid. Right now it's a simple list. I want 3 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile. Each card should show the post image, title, and date. Keep the existing data fetching logic.
evals.expected_output: Existing specs (specs/posts/) and fixtures (drafts/fixtures/posts/) found and used as the starting point. Reconciliation executed. Existing spec assertions for list layout updated or replaced for card grid. New assertions added for grid layout at desktop/tablet/mobile. Playwright verification at multiple viewports. Regression check against existing pages.

evals.prompt: The quote block text is too small on desktop. Bump up the font size of the blockquote text and make the attribution line (second paragraph) italic. That's it, just CSS.
evals.expected_output: Existing spec (specs/quote/basic.md) and fixture (drafts/fixtures/quote/basic.plain.html) found and used. New assertions added to the spec for larger font size and italic attribution before implementing. CSS-only change to blocks/quote/quote.css. Playwright scripts written and run — browser verification not skipped despite simplicity.
